word: G755 - ἀρχιτρίκλινος - architríklinos - ar-khee-tree'-klee-nos - Governor of the feast

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρχιτρίκλινος

- Transliteration: Architriklinos

- Phonetic: ar-khee-tree'-klee-nos

- Definition:

1. the superintendent of the dining room, a table master.

- Origin: from G746 and a compound of G5140 and G2827 (a dinner-bed, because composed of three couches)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G746 and a compound of G5140 and G2827 (a dinner bed because composed of three couches); director of the entertainment: - governor (ruler) of the feast.
